title: Harden backend with middleware, tests, and docs
acceptance_criteria: CORS, logging, and request timeout middleware protect `/api/oracle` for the upcoming Next.js origin
Integration test with mocked OpenAI client exercises streaming path and validates sanitized output
`backend/README.md` documents prerequisites, env vars, run/test commands, and prompt-safety guarantees
Automated task (Makefile or Taskfile) runs vet, lint, and tests via single command
